body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42403", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "Apache Neethi does not properly detect circular references in policy definitions. When a WS-Policy document contains circular policy references (where Policy A references Policy B which references Policy A), the policy normalization process can enter an infinite loop or cause excessive recursion, leading to a stack overflow or application hang. An attacker can craft malicious policy documents with circular references to cause a Denial of Service condition\n\nUsers are recommended to upgrade to version 3.2.2, which fixes this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00763, "percentile": 0.50556}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2hfh-9h53-qc24", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T02:39:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2hfh-9h53-qc24", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2hfh-9h53-qc24"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42403"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-01T09:16:17Z", "published_at": "2026-05-01T09:30:25Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42403", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/zm6t8skkkskjwk1881l4m4n0l7dqclzo", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/01/7", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2hfh-9h53-qc24"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/ws-neethi", "summary": "Apache Neethi does not properly detect circular references in policy definitions.", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-07T02:39:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2hfh-9h53-qc24", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.neethi:neethi"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Neethi does not properly detect circular references in policy definitions.
